scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,BROWSER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node scripts/open-browser.js"
scripts.start: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.kill-ports: powershell.exe -Command "@(3000,3001) | ForEach-Object { $p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }" 2>nul || true
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
